description: Non-peptide chemical, metabolite, cofactor, small-molecule inhibitor or biochemical ancillary product.
mandatory_evidence: Complete chemical name, structure, formula, molecular mass and CAS/UNII where applicable
Salt, counter-ion, polymorph, solvate, hydration and redox state
Orthogonal identity by NMR, LC-MS, GC-MS, IR or justified methods
Assay, related substances and degradation products
Residual solvents, elemental impurities and water
Formulation, excipients, container closure and stability
Sterility, endotoxin and particles for sterile presentation
automatic_rejection: Salt, redox state or chemical form omitted
Identity supported only by catalogue name
Food or dietary grade presented as sterile-drug suitability
